text:
Once upon an autumn time, there was an orphaned crow who had once sung a song about winter.

One day, snowflakes fluttered down from the sky.

The crow pecked at the snowflakes.

The snowflakes melted.

The crow flew south.

Southward.

There was a warm place.

In a quiet house.

Three people lived there

You don't remember them.

Snowflakes fell into the glasses?

Maybe you could think straight again?
